prompt: Create a deliberately low-quality vertical smartphone night photo that looks like an eerie candid social-media snapshot. A young woman with long blonde hair crouches on a playground slide, facing the camera, making a V-sign peace pose beside her face with one hand while the other hand rests on the red slide rail. She has a slim build, pale skin, large eyes, glossy lips, dangling earrings, and a small necklace. She wears a black off-shoulder ruffled crop top, dark shorts mostly hidden by her crouched pose, white socks, and chunky white platform sneakers with sparkly details. Her knees are pulled up close to her chest and her feet point toward the viewer, creating a wide-angle phone-camera perspective. The setting is a dark outdoor park at night with trees and foliage in the background, a bright harsh lamp glowing on the right side, and a faint blue playground railing behind her. Add exactly 1 ghostly figure: a tall, vague, semi-transparent shadow silhouette standing behind her in the upper center background, with indistinct head and shoulders, barely visible but unsettling. Make the image grainy, underexposed, slightly blurry, noisy, compressed, and unevenly lit like an old phone photo or accidental paranormal photo. Use a vertical 9:16 composition with black app-like borders and a small white X icon in the top-left corner, as if viewed inside a mobile image viewer. No extra text, no watermark, keep the ghost subtle but noticeable.
promptEn: Create a deliberately low-quality vertical smartphone night photo that looks like an eerie candid social-media snapshot. A young woman with long blonde hair crouches on a playground slide, facing the camera, making a V-sign peace pose beside her face with one hand while the other hand rests on the red slide rail. She has a slim build, pale skin, large eyes, glossy lips, dangling earrings, and a small necklace. She wears a black off-shoulder ruffled crop top, dark shorts mostly hidden by her crouched pose, white socks, and chunky white platform sneakers with sparkly details. Her knees are pulled up close to her chest and her feet point toward the viewer, creating a wide-angle phone-camera perspective. The setting is a dark outdoor park at night with trees and foliage in the background, a bright harsh lamp glowing on the right side, and a faint blue playground railing behind her. Make the image grainy, underexposed, slightly blurry, noisy, compressed, and unevenly lit like an old phone photo or accidental paranormal photo. Use a vertical 9:16 composition with black app-like borders and a small white X icon in the top-left corner, as if viewed inside a mobile image viewer. No extra text, no watermark, keep the ghost subtle but noticeable.
promptZh: 创作一张刻意呈现低画质的竖屏手机夜拍照片，看起来像是一张诡异的社交媒体抓拍。一位留着 长金发 的年轻女性蹲在游乐场滑梯上，面向镜头，一只手在脸旁比出 V 字手势，另一只手扶在红色的滑梯扶手上。她身材苗条，皮肤白皙，有着大眼睛、亮泽的嘴唇、垂坠耳环和一条小项链。她穿着黑色露肩荷叶边短上衣、深色短裤（大部分被蹲姿遮挡）、白色袜子以及带有闪亮细节的厚底白色运动鞋。她的双膝紧贴胸前，双脚指向镜头，呈现出广角手机镜头的透视效果。背景是黑暗的户外公园，有树木和植被，右侧有一盏强烈的灯光，她身后是模糊的蓝色游乐场栏杆。添加 1 个幽灵形象：一个高大、模糊、半透明的阴影剪影，站在她身后上方中央的背景中，头部和肩部轮廓不清，若隐若现且令人不安。使图像具有颗粒感、曝光不足、轻微模糊、噪点多、压缩感强且光线不均匀，就像旧手机拍摄的照片或意外拍到的超自然照片。使用 9:16 的竖构图，带有黑色的应用界面边框，左上角有一个白色的小 X 图标，仿佛是在手机图片查看器中观看。不要添加额外文字或水印，保持幽灵形象微妙但清晰可见。
